name: Max Klymenko
oneLine: Ukrainian-British creator behind Career Ladder, the ladder-based street interview show.
bio: Max Klymenko is a Ukrainian-born, London-based creator and entrepreneur who previously worked as a lawyer and as a corporate consultant at Accenture before going full-time on content. In 2024 he launched Career Ladder, a vertical-video format where he stands on the back of a ladder and tries to guess a stranger's job in under two minutes, which has become one of the most-watched non-animated shows on the internet. He also runs the communications agency KLYM&CO and was named to Forbes 30 Under 30 in Media and Marketing.
style: Vertical short-form street interviews on YouTube Shorts, TikTok and Instagram Reels
